title: AP Works — National Academy of Construction 0.10% Contribution
text_english: An amount of {{nac_pct}}% (default 0.10%) of the GROSS BILLS SHALL BE DEDUCTED from the Contractor's running and final bills as their CONTRIBUTION to the NATIONAL ACADEMY OF CONSTRUCTION, Hyderabad. (Source: GO Ms No 27, T,R&B (Roads-III) Department, dated 29-06-2015.)
